tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: THE WORLD OF VIDEO GAMES
tasks.text:
Video games have become one of the most popular forms 1.1. _________ entertainment in the world. Millions of people play them every day, 1.2. _________ on computers, consoles, or mobile phones. The first video games were created in 1.3. _________ 1970s and were very simple compared to the ones we have today.

Some people believe that video games are bad 1.4. _________ young people, but research has shown that this is not always true. Games can actually help players improve 1.5. _________ problem-solving skills and reaction times. 1.6. _________, it is important not to spend too 1.7. _________ time playing, as it can affect sleep and schoolwork.

Today, professional gaming, 1.8. _________ is known as esports, has become a serious career for many young people. Tournaments are watched 1.9. _________ millions of fans around the world, and the best players can earn 1.10. _________ much as traditional sports stars.
